title: DelegationEnvelope
description: Describes a governed work handoff between agents, services, or humans.

from_session.description: Session ID of the agent initiating the handoff.

to_agent.description: Identifier of the agent, service, or human receiving the work.

work_parcel.description: Natural-language description of the work being delegated.

acceptance_criteria.description: Conditions that must be true for the work to be considered complete.

context_ref.description: Correlation ID of prior context to carry forward to the delegate. Null if none.
